theme_and_archetype.archetype: Archetype 3 (Pastel & Soft) mixed with Soft Utility

typography.guidelines: Do not default to bold for headers; mix font weights. Headlines > 32px MUST use tracking-tight.

colors.guidelines: Ensure text contrast meets APCA/WCAG standards. ALWAYS explicitly set text color on hover. Use primary colors primarily for CTAs.

layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: Control Room Grid for dashboards (tight gap-4 or gap-6). Cards span 1, 2, or 3 columns based on data density.
layout_and_spacing.containers: Containers with borders must have internal padding (p-6 or p-8) to prevent text collision.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: Rounded-xl (12px) for cards, rounded-lg (8px) for buttons/inputs. Avoid overly soft UI.

surfaces_and_micro_themes.header: Crystal Glass: backdrop-blur-xl bg-background/80 with a 1px delicate inner stroke (border-border/40). z-50.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.dashboard_cards: Neumorphism & Clay crispness: Flat background, 1px subtle border, no heavy shadow by default. Hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and subtle shadow (shadow-lg).
surfaces_and_micro_themes.pomodoro_timer: Grid Borders (Technical look): Expose the grid, border-r border-b border-border/40 for focused statistics.

components_and_interactions.shadcn_usage: Use Shadcn components for interactive logic (Forms, Modals, Inputs, Calendar, Dropdown, Table) but customize styling to fit the theme.
components_and_interactions.buttons: Primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90. Secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/90.
components_and_interactions.hover_states: All interactive elements MUST have explicit hover states (background AND text color).
components_and_interactions.focus_states: Must have HIGHER contrast. focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/50.
components_and_interactions.animations: Framer Motion for micro-interactions. Hover lifts, subtle staggered entrance animations for lists.
components_and_interactions.accessibility: MUST respect prefers-reduced-motion. data-testid attribute is REQUIRED on all interactive and key informational elements.

media_and_assets.icons: lucide-react for default crisp UI icons.

auth_hero.description: Calm, light-filled workspace with books and greenery. Use on the right/left split side of the Login/Register page.

ai_generator_bg.description: Abstract soft pastel gradient. Use as a subtle, low-opacity background behind the AI Study Plan Generator section.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the color palette. Do not invent new colors outside this system.
Ensure the theme toggle mechanism robustly applies dark mode classes at the top DOM level.
Use Manrope for headings and IBM Plex Sans for body text.
All interactive elements MUST have `data-testid` attributes (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button').
Dashboard should utilize Shadcn components (Cards, Progress, Tabs, Charts) stylized cleanly without excessive drop shadows.
Hero/Auth images must be wrapped securely and respect height limits on mobile (max-h-[80vh]).
Ensure all forms use Shadcn Form components rather than raw HTML inputs.
